keyMessages: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
Pathways programs help educators identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through partnership.
WCEPS supports schools and districts with educational resources, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment analyses.
proofPoints: WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
The site says WCEPS extends the impact of University of Wisconsin-Madison educational innovations.
brief.layoutRecommendation: Use a structured one-pager with a summary column, key message cards, evidence-backed proof points, and a bottom CTA band.

headlineOptions: Customized support for schools and districts
subheadOptions: Pathways Powered by WCEPS helps education teams chart a course through research-based resources, professional learning, assessments, program.
WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
copy.body: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs. For education leaders, this draft focuses on research-based educational supports and service pathways. WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
bullets: WCEPS tailors research-based products and services to meet unique education needs.
Pathways programs help educators identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through partnership.
WCEPS supports schools and districts with educational resources, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment.
WCEPS is described on the Pathways site as a 501(c)(3) charitable nonprofit organization.
The site says WCEPS extends the impact of University of Wisconsin-Madison educational innovations.
copy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

fittedCopy.headline: Customized educational solutions for schools and districts
fittedCopy.deck: WCEPS helps education teams compare Pathways programs and services across research-based resources, professional learning, assessments, program evaluations, and content alignment support.
proofPoints: Tailored products and services meet unique education needs.
Teams can identify a challenge, choose a pathway, and continue learning through ongoing partnership.
Offerings include educational resources, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment analyses.
fittedCopy.footer: Draft generated for internal review. Claims should remain tied to the source evidence shown with this artifact.

compositionTemplate.typographyScale: magazine headline, one deck, short proof rail
compositionTemplate.artPlateTreatment: edge-to-edge editorial art column or band
compositionTemplate.copyPlacement: large type block with compact editorial proof band

designRecipe.hierarchy: Magazine one-pager with app-owned official logo, dominant headline, concise deck, compact proof band, and CTA action lockup; visual weight supports a research-based comparison pathway story.
designRecipe.artDirection: Premium education-leadership editorial concept for WCEPS: calm, evidence-led, university-adjacent visuals suggesting pathways, collaboration, assessment, and district decision-making through refined photographic/graphic composition rather than literal brochure elements.
designRecipe.placeholderStrategy: Use crop, depth, tonal contrast, and quiet negative space to imply the left reading zone and lower proof rhythm; no fake text, fake logos, blank cards, placeholder boxes, UI modules, or contact bars.
designRecipe.appComposition: App places the official logo top-left, headline and deck in the left text zone, proof points and CTA in the lower proof band; generated concept provides the integrated right-field art direction and compositional structure only.
promptDirectives: Design the full letter-portrait one-pager concept, not a decorative background.
Create a strong right-field editorial art column that naturally opens space for left-side copy and a lower proof band.
Express research-based education solutions, pathway comparison, and trusted district partnership for education leaders.
Preserve all real text, official logo, CTA, and export decisions for the app; generate no readable text or faux branding.

compositionScore.question: Would I send this to the WCEPS team without apology?

Avoid document panels, empty modules, fake cards, or CTA-like shapes.

imageResults.revisedPrompt:
Create a portrait full-bleed campaign art plate, 1024x1536, for a polished institutional education nonprofit one-pager. No readable text of any kind, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no wordmarks, no seals, no badges, no CTA graphics, no arrows, no chevrons, no mountain-like marks, no charts with labels, no UI, no cards, no panels, no document mockups.

Composition: premium magazine one-pager background/art field with a clear left reading zone reserved by composition only: calmer, darker navy-to-teal tonal field with subtle texture and negative space in the upper-left and mid-left for app-added logo, headline, and deck. Right side is the dominant editorial visual column with rich depth and visual energy. Lower portion has a compact proof-band rhythm implied only through layered visual pacing and quiet tonal contrast, not boxes or fake modules.

Subject and mood: authentic, warm institutional education-sector storytelling. Show an inclusive small group of educators and district leaders in a bright modern school or office planning environment, reviewing generic unmarked materials, resource packets, and strategy notes. Keep faces not close-up and not overly detailed; avoid posed stock workshop clichés. Convey research-informed educational support, customized pathways, comparison of options, trusted service, collaborative planning, and parent brand overview without depicting specific sub-brands. Use university-adjacent credibility through refined environment, thoughtful composition, evidence-led atmosphere, clean nonprofit education tone.

Visual style: authentic editorial photography with refined abstract illustrative atmosphere, sophisticated color grading using deep navy #142836, teal #0081A4, aqua #3EB3BD, and soft green #5EA974 accents. Layered depth: foreground soft blur of unmarked papers/materials, midground collaborative planning gestures, background bright inclusive school/office space with glass, shelves, or soft architectural lines. Strong right-field column, intentional crop, rich visual density, type-safe contrast zones, quiet negative space on left. Avoid generic graduation imagery, random classroom stock photography, literal brand-shape wallpaper, blank panels, washed-out fades, decorative-only design, close-up faces, detailed hands, fake book titles, publisher names, labels, icons, or any readable marks.

Quality: NY media/ad-agency quality, polished full-page marketing artifact art plate, finished editorial concept, no template scaffolding, no invented claims, no text.

request.topic: research-based educational supports and service pathways
request.notes: Use the parent brand without over-describing individual programs.

sourceEvidence.excerpt: Discover your pathway through WCEPS' research-based educational resources, publications, assessments, professional learning, program evaluations, and content alignment analyses.
sourceEvidence.label: Homepage positioning

sourceEvidence.excerpt: We are a non-profit committed to supporting educators in K-12 and higher education in their mission to support students and create an educational landscape where all students, regardless of their background, can thrive and reach their full potential.
sourceEvidence.label: Nonprofit purpose

sourceEvidence.excerpt: The Wisconsin Center for Education Products and Services is a 501(c)3 charitable non-profit organization with a mission to extend the impact of the University of Wisconsin-Madison's educational innovations and bring research-based, innovative, and customized educational solutions to schools and districts.
sourceEvidence.label: WCEPS mission footer

sourceEvidence.excerpt: As a non-profit organization offering research-based solutions, we strive to listen to what our district colleagues need, understand your challenges, and consider how our programs can help you reach your goals, without pushing things you don't need.
sourceEvidence.label: Contact page tone
